channel.title: Elmpce on MALF
channel.description: Recent content in Elmpce on MALF

item.title: Ensemble Learning for Model Prediction in Cancer Epidemiology
item.description: To improve model selection and prediction in cancer epidemiology data adaptive ensemble learning methods based on the Super Learner as a method for variable selection via cross-validation are suitable. To selection of the optimal regression algorithm among all weighted combinations of a set of candidate machine learning algorithms the ensemble learning method improves model accuracy and prediction.
